About the Founder

A superintendent's eye.
A craftsman's hands.

Over a decade running high-rise sites for{" "} Menkes,{" "} Solmar and{" "} Tribute Communities built a single, non-negotiable habit: deliver on time, on budget, and to a finish that survives inspection. Sunwest Builds is that habit, pointed at custom residential work.

“Residential clients deserve the same rigor a developer demands. That's what we bring — every site, every day.”
